items.name: Home Jersey 2026
items.desc: Navy and chalk hoops, embroidered crest. The one worn on county final day.

items.name: Away Jersey 2026
items.desc: Chalk white with a navy chest band. For the days the colours clash.

items.name: Kids Home Jersey
items.desc: Same crest, smaller sizes. Future captains start here.

items.name: Match Football
items.desc: Size 5 match ball, the same spec our seniors play with every Sunday.

items.name: Training Football
items.desc: Size 4 trainer that survives wet grass, wall sessions and the dog.

items.name: Sliotars · 3 Pack
items.desc: Match-weight sliotars with raised rims. One for the game, two for the ditch.

items.name: Ash Hurley
items.desc: Irish ash, hand-shaped bás, balanced for striking off both sides.

items.name: First Hurley
items.desc: Lighter ash for small hands learning the swing. Sized for ages 5 to 10.

items.name: Hurley & Grip Bundle
items.desc: A 34 inch ash hurley wrapped with a club-colours grip, ready for the wall.
